In the Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Rulcs, 1985,- (a) In rule 67 A- (A) in sub-rule(a), after clause (iii), the followingclausc shall be insencd, namely :~ "(iv) the purpose of restraining or immobilising wild animals by or underthe authority of the Govern- ment and approved by that Government."; (D) in sub-rule(b), after the words "persons performing medical or scientific functions" the words "or the authority exercising thc powers under sub-clause (iv) of clause (a)" shall be inserted.
